---
title: "Onboarding & First-run Tutorial"
labels: enhancement, UX
assignees: ''
---

Add an interactive onboarding flow that introduces new users to key features:

- `PantryScanner` (scan, manual add)
- Meal planner basics (add recipe, drag/drop)
- Shopping list and sharing

Acceptance:
- Short modal tour runs on first login and sets `hasSeenTutorial` on the user document.
- Users can replay the tour from Settings.

Estimate: 3-5 story points
